title: Tau Configuration
description: Configuration for Tau and Tau extensions.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference used by editors for validation and autocomplete.

enabled.description: Master switch for context-sync. When false: no /context-sync, parent cannot call the agent, validation does not auto-run sync.

automation.description: When true with sync.enabled, the coding agent may call context-sync. When false, only manual /context-sync (validation auto-run still allowed if validation.enabled).

enabled.description: Validate context membership after agent turns and auto-run context-sync on failure (requires sync.enabled).

ignoreGlobs.description: Project-relative files excluded from context membership validation and sync.

nudgeEveryPercent.description: Context growth interval between automatic pruning hints.

default: No prune is required yet unless broad exploration has converged or substantial evidence is already irrelevant. Continue coherent work.
Move toward a pruning point now. Finish the current coherent step, then prune before starting another broad exploration. Managed context is materially increasing model cost.
Prune now before further tool work. Continuing with stale managed context is wasting money.
nudgeInstructions.description: Ordered automatic pruning instructions. Later reminders repeat the final instruction, and the final tier requires an anchor before further tool work.

^.*$.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the provider becomes available again.

editor.description: Editor used by the reference picker open action. default uses $VISUAL, $EDITOR, then code.

branchChoices.description: Maximum branch choices shown when switching a reference branch.

maxOutputBytes.description: Maximum raw stdout/stderr bytes sent to the agent.

name.description: Short command name shown in notifications and failure messages.

command.description: Shell command run with sh -lc after matching files change.

cwd.description: Command working directory, relative to project root.

details.description: Free-text explanation of what this command checks or runs.

includeGlobs.description: Project-relative files that trigger this command.

excludeGlobs.description: Project-relative files ignored for this command.

commands.description: Commands run after matched files change.

turnLimit.description: Initial soft cap for tool-using turns per user prompt.

nudgeEveryTurns.description: Tool-using turn interval between turn-budget hints.

softCapIncrement.description: Turns added when the soft cap is reached.
